description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBlack mesh bag with one main zippered compartment Faux-alligator skin corded piping and facing detail with brandingSynthetic lining with zippered pocketOne zippered pocket at backTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSize,Height: 24 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 12 cm
